LibraryMap.note: "Kirchen Bell. This is the town we live in."<CR>"Yes. It's not very big, but... I think it's a peaceful town that's easy to live in."<CR>"I really love this town, too!"

"The Forest of Fairies... I wonder if fairies really exist..."<CR>"I heard that humans with impure hearts can't see them."<CR>"O-oh, right! Now that I think about it, I saw a fairy the other day! I just forgot, ahaha..."
"This garden is a mess, but it's pretty because of all the flowers blooming."<CR>"Yeah. Not many people visit, so a lot of the plants growing here are shy around people."
"People say that if you go here early in the morning, you can find all kinds of things washed up on the shore."<CR>"Uu... Early in the morning, huh... I'm really not good at waking up early..."
"This is a really deep canyon... I looked down the edge of a cliff before, but I couldn't see the bottom at all..."<CR>"The footing isn't very stable either, so be careful."
"...I don't like this place."<CR>"Yeah. There are lots of graves here. If you go at night, there could be lots of ghosts..."<CR>"S-stop that! I don't want to think about it!"
"...This palace is all upside down and inverted. I wonder why it's like this?"<CR>"Maybe someone with strange taste built it like this to surprise other people."
"Hmm, this place doesn't seem like a part of this world..."<CR>"Very sharp. This place is actually..."<CR>"If you're going to say it's the netherworld, I don't want to know!"
"What could be sealed here..."<CR>"Maybe a super big, strong Puni?"<CR>"No, it's probably a evil spirit..."<CR>"Well, we know good things are never sealed away."
"This lake is wondrous and beautiful..."<CR>"This would be fun to swim in!"<CR>"The water's good, so I like it!"<CR>"People sure think differently."
"This was formerly my atelier."<CR>"That's unfair! It's so big, my atelier doesn't even compare! That's so unfair, Plachta!"<CR>"I-I'm not really sure how to respond..."
"This road was made for people making pilgrimages to the church. There are cabins to rest in, too."<CR>"There aren't a huge number of people making pilgrimages, so it's a little unmaintained..."
"This farm has a big wheat field."<CR>"...Is it really okay to take the wheat?"<CR>"The farmers are really nice, and say it's okay to take what we need. We should thank them sometime."
"This place has a pretty flower bed!"<CR>"The soil quality here is good, and it gets lots of sun. The flowers say it's like heaven."<CR>"Yeah. It makes me want to sun bathe and take a nap."
"What's the cabin here for?"<CR>"It's a place to leave logs from lumbering."<CR>"Huh... It seems like a lot of work to carry lumber from here to town..."

"This is a large group of ruins spread out on a field."<CR>"Hmm, I wonder what this place was in the past?"<CR>"Judging from the shape of the pillars... A temple? Something could have been enshrined here."

"This is a forest near the town. The monsters that appear aren't very strong, so it's great for gathering."<CR>"That reminds me, we all came here to play when we were kids, then got scolded for leaving the town..."

"The trees grow thinly in this forest. It's called the Blessed Forest because it blesses us with such bounty... It's a pretty straightforward name."<CR>"Isn't it good to have an easy to understand name?"
"This is a shallow forest with some openings..."<CR>"Yeah. You can pick good fruit here, so the townsfolk come here to gather them once in a while. It's like a place for some relaxation."
"This forest is kind of humid. I wonder if the mushrooms growing here are edible?"<CR>"Even I'm not very familiar with mushrooms. It would probably be best not to try them."
"Enlightened...? That's a pretty amazing name."<CR>"Apparently, long ago, a certain sage came here to train, and achieved enlightenment."<CR>"Huh, maybe I should try training too."
"These ruins have decayed completely, and have been overgrown by trees."<CR>"Huh, you can even see the roots covering them in some places... I wonder what era this is from?"
"This is an open area inside a forest."<CR>"That's right. I asked the plants, and they said some fierce animals have claimed it as their territory."<CR>"I see... We need to be careful, then..."
"This is a forest near a rocky area."<CR>"Yeah. I didn't think trees could grow in a place like this."<CR>"Don't underestimate the power of trees. They're amazing, they can take root anywhere."

"It's dark because of all the trees growing, and everything looks the same. It seems easy to get lost here."<CR>"You need to advance slowly while leaving markers... I don't want to ever end up stranded."
"There are two trees here with intertwined branches, like they're holding hands."<CR>"...I see. I thought they were just normal trees, but now that you mention it, I can see what you mean..."
"These ruins are near a river."<CR>"Despite the long passage of time, it's resisted the river's erosion, and still remains. It must have originally been a very strong building."
"This forest always has really thick fog, so you can barely see ahead of you."<CR>"The plants are sad that they don't get enough light because of the fog, too. It makes me feel bad..."
"This place is like a little spring. The main sights are the three bridges all lined up."<CR>"So that's why it's called the Three Bridge Springs."<CR>"Yeah. It's kind of a famous place."
"This is the shore of a lake. I wonder if you could go to the little island you can see nearby?"<CR>"You could swim there, but... Is there really a reason to go?"
"This is a really quiet lake. The only things you hear are the sound of water, rustling leaves, and the cries of monsters..."<CR>"Wait... Is that really quiet?"
"Apparently this is a famous place to fish. If you cast a line, fish will bite almost instantly."<CR>"Huh... I've never gone fishing before. Maybe I should try it sometime..."
"There's a small island in the middle of the pond. There's a bridge, so you can walk over to it."<CR>"It's a really small island, so try not to slip."
"This place has lots of rough rocks."<CR>"Yes, there are many hiding places, so be careful for surprise attacks."<CR>"I don't think hide and seek would ever end here..."
"This hill has abundant vegetation. The slope is pretty steep, so you need to be careful while walking."<CR>"Yeah. But it's such a nice hill... It makes me want to run down at full speed..."
"This slope leads up a mountain. It seems to be right at the border of different climates."<CR>"It has green grass, and white sand... It's a little strange to see it so neatly divided..."
"This is a sandy valley. The dying trees stand out, and it's sad to see them..."<CR>"...It's a harsh place with barren soil. I'd like to transplant them, if I could..."
"This place has lots of bones..."<CR>"Yes. It got its name from the rows of bones standing out, almost like a forest."<CR>"Uu... I don't want to go here at night..."
"These are ruins near the waterside... Right?"<CR>"Yes... Ruins are very valuable. The study of how people lived in the past is very useful to us."
"It's said that this place was once a grand city."<CR>"Huh. So people were living here in the past... I wonder why it ended up like this?"
